title: asperula cymulosa
intro: Asperula cymulosa, also known as Wood Sorrel or Alpine Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant species in the Rubiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, including vitamin C, which contributes to its health benefits such as boosting the immune system and improving digestion. Traditionally, Asperula cymulosa has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to treat conditions like fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
